summary: Tested Declarations V2 Wizard implementation. All features working correctly: 14 sections navigation, auto-save with debounce, 'Non ho questa tipologia' toggle, signature canvas with terms acceptance, mobile compatibility. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: V2 Wizard implementation is complete and functional

All 14 sections present: dati_personali, situazione_familiare, redditi_lavoro, redditi_autonomo, immobili, canoni_locazione, plusvalenze, investimenti_finanziari, criptomonete, spese_deducibili, deduzioni_agevolazioni, documenti_allegati, note_aggiuntive, autorizzazione_firma
'Non ho questa tipologia' checkbox hides form fields when checked
Signature section shows completion requirement (50% minimum)
Terms acceptance checkbox required before signing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Declarations V2 Wizard fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/declarations/v2/declarations, GET /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{id}, PUT /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{id}/section (auto-save), POST /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{id}/sign, POST /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{id}/submit. Signature requires 50% completion and terms acceptance.

declarations_list.notes: GET /api/declarations/v2/declarations returns client declarations with status, completion_percentage

wizard_navigation.notes: 14 sections visible in navigation bar, Precedente/Successivo buttons work

section_fields.notes: All section-specific fields render correctly (dati_personali, situazione_familiare, etc.)

mark_section_completed.notes: 'Segna come completata' button updates section status and completion percentage

non_ho_questa_tipologia.notes: Checkbox hides form fields, marks section as completed/not_applicable

signature_section.notes: Shows completion status, terms text, acceptance checkbox, signature canvas

signature_canvas.notes: react-signature-canvas renders correctly, Cancella/Salva Firma buttons present

signature_validation.notes: Cannot sign without terms acceptance, cannot submit without signature

mobile_compatibility.notes: Responsive design works on 390x844 viewport, navigation shows numbered steps

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{i: PASS - Returns declaration with all 14 sections
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/declarations/v2/declarations/{i: PASS - Updates section data, recalculates completion
